# Best SEO Keyword Rank Tracking Tool

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-04 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 361

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Recently, one of our readers asked me what tool I use to track
the SEO keyword ranking of my WordPress sites.

Over the years, I’ve used several tools to track the keyword
ranking, including Semrush and Ahrefs.

The downside is that those tools are extremely expensive. Even
worse, you’ll have to pay extra for every additional user. Plus,
they only let you track a limited number of keywords.

So, I asked my team at All in One SEO (AIOSEO) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ixuKFRiznmrNKmWD5Y-vH6X1yldS0-CkUiFmyiOIp9s ) to build a keyword ranking tool so that my
team could access the reports right within WordPress.

AIOSEO's keyword tracking tool is by far the BEST on the market.
Here are a few reasons:

- Accuracy: It gathers data from Google Search Console, so you
get accurate results right within WordPress.

- Pin and monitor: You can add the keywords that matter to your
website and monitor the ranking over a period of time. You can
even categorize keywords into themes for easy access.

- Affordable: Premium SEO tools are extremely expensive and limit
the number of keywords you can track. With AIOSEO, anyone who can
access your WordPress dashboard with the right user access can
view ranking reports (no per-user pricing)

- Complete SEO plugin: It is the best WordPress SEO plugin that
offers all the BEST features to help you improve your ranking and
organic traffic

- Integration with popular plugins: It offers support for new
schema types and seamless integration with popular WordPress
plugins, including page builders, WooCommerce, and more.

If you’re always looking for an SEO plugin that helps you improve
SEO and grow organic traffic, AIOSEO is your best bet.

This week, AIOSEO is offering a HUGE SALE.

You can get the AIOSEO plugin for 70% OFF 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..mtblVItc6Dp2sBcX5dS8t1yr5aAbDaBIXkfpGwIoxLo )!

Plus, they’ve released tons of new SEO features this past year:

- Google EEAT addon to help improve the quality of content you
publish.

- Broken link checker to find and fix broken links automatically.

- Support for more page builder plugins.

- Enhance your SEO visibility by ensuring all your URLs are
indexed.
And a lot more…
